title: ECLIPSE WP2_Generation of a Biotin-Tagged Dual-Display Phage_dataset
author: Conoci, Sabrina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The dataset is related to the publication entitled “  Generation of a Biotin-Tagged Dual-Display Phage”     of a work based on the development of a   biotin-tagged dual-display phage as innovative tool for the detection and quantification of peptide/targets interaction  in phage display . The data includes the sequences used for the biotin aceptor   sBT     peptide cloning into   M13K07 phage.
steps_raw: The dataset is related to the publication entitled “  Generation of a Biotin-Tagged Dual-Display Phage”     of a work based on the development of a   biotin-tagged dual-display phage as innovative tool for the detection and quantification of peptide/targets interaction  in phage display . The data includes the sequences used for the biotin aceptor   sBT     peptide cloning into   M13K07 phage.
